headline: BofA Raises its Price Target on CF Industries Holdings (CF) to $103 from $86
summary: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:CF) is one of the 10 Most Profitable S&P 500 Stocks to Buy Now. On March 18, 2026, BofA raised the price target on CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:CF) to $103 from $86 and maintained an Underperform rating, citing stronger FY26 profit expectations but warning the fertilizer cycle could prove “sticky.” The […]
